headline: Adobe (ADBE) Announces Upgrades to GenStudio
summary: ​Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) is one of the Best Stocks to Buy While the Market Is Down. ​On April 20, Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) announced major upgrades to Adobe GenStudio, which is the company’s AI platform for content creation. Management noted that they are building an agentic content supply chain, which will automate assembly lines from planning […]

headline: Adobe Leads 3 Big Buyback Programs Worth Up to 25% of Market Cap
summary: Three stocks, including software giant Adobe, just announced huge buyback programs. Adobe's $25 billion authorization is equal to nearly a quarter of its value.
